title: Journey

education.desc: Early childhood education, building the foundation of creativity and socialization.
Six years of primary education, building literacy, numeracy, and character skills.
Secondary education, began exploring the world of technology and computers.
Studying software development, databases, and web & mobile programming. Active in extracurricular activities and competitions.

work.desc: Developing mobile applications for local clients using Flutter. Fully responsible from UI design to API integration and Play Store deployment.
Involved in developing the company's internal information system. Tasked with building report modules using Laravel and conducting feature testing.
Collaborated with a team to develop IT curriculums and taught at 4 different educational institutions. Shared knowledge and best practices in technology with students.

subtitle: My educational background and professional experience.
